Advancing Africa's Economy Through Evidence, Policy and Innovation

Our comprehensive approach to transforming inclusion across Africa

Explore the Pillars

Research

  • State of Financial Inclusion reports
  • Policy briefs & strategic recommendations
  • Enterprise mapping initiatives
  • Financial inclusion index development

Tech Lab

  • Digital tools for business development

Web & mobile apps for SMEs
Data Analytics

Custom Solutions

Islamic Finance

Shariah-compliant finance solutions, Takaful insurance, and Islamic banking frameworks.

  • Ethical financing & value-based investments
  • Takaful insurance Islamic cooperative insurance
  • Sukuk frameworks Islamic bond instruments
  • Shariah-compliant products for Muslim communities
Islamic Banking
Shariah-compliant financial services
Microfinance
Halal micro-lending solutions
Zakat Management
Digital Zakat distribution systems

Health Inclusion

Health financing, medical savings, micro-insurance, and emergency health loans across Africa.

  • Medical savings accounts for healthcare access
  • Health micro-insurance affordable health coverage
  • Emergency health loans quick access to medical funds
  • Digital health wallets integrated health financing
Health Financing
Innovative healthcare funding models
Community Health
Grassroots health programs
Telemedicine Access
Remote healthcare solutions
CAFIA

Center for Africa Financial Inclusion and Advancement. Transforming Africa's informal sector into a catalyst for inclusive economic growth.
